response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive software engineering experience and recent, highly relevant work in AI-agent infrastructure, coupled with a strong entrepreneurial spirit and a track record of technical leadership. However, the resume provides less explicit demonstration of the strategic AI/cloud advisory and future-state definition responsibilities crucial for a Principal Engineer at this level.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (18 years) with a craftsmanship approach.
Recent and highly relevant experience building AI-agent infrastructure and tooling.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial spirit and technical leadership through open source, workshops, and mentorship.
concerns: Less explicit experience in strategic AI/cloud advisory and future-state definition.
Career trajectory primarily as Staff/Senior IC, with less explicit Principal/Director-level strategic scope.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field, though practical experience is strong.
